title: Mod Showcase Modpack [Fabric]
description: Modpack for making mod showcase video or testing out the mod content.
body:
![mod-showcase-modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/382fbd58508574ff0a7822bb94e9c115aa45248a.jpeg)

# Why Using This Modpack at First Place?
It is one of the most essential part for mod reviewer to test out the mod before present the content to the public. So I decided to create a modpack that is sufficient enough for testing or showcasing the mod to the audience.

# How to Use This Modpack
You can start downloading this modpack and install the mod that you would like to try out. Then create the new world for testing the mod. When you are trying out the mod, here are some recommendation action you can test a specific aspect of mod.

1. Weapon related mod - You can summon dummy to try out the damage and effect of the mod. The dummy never gets destroyed when you are dealing the damage to the dummy.
2. Food related mod - You can investigate the amount of hunger and saturation that you have after consuming the food.
3. Entity related mod - You can see the health bar to learn more about the health that the entity have
